title: terrellia jejuna
intro: Terrellia jejuna, also known as the "T. jejuna" or "Boneset with Leaves," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Terrellia jejuna include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. It is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
